headline: The Post-Ozempic Economy? 2 Industries Bracing for a Slimmer, Less Hungry America
summary: The use of weight-loss drugs is growing like crazy and changing the entire consumer economy along with it.

headline: Leerink Says AC Immune (ACIU) Eli Lilly Tau Program Amendment Is Great News
summary: AC Immune SA (NASDAQ:ACIU) is one of the 7 Best Strong Buy European Stocks to Invest In. On April 7, 2026, Leerink analyst Marc Goodman said AC Immune SA (NASDAQ:ACIU) amending its collaboration with Eli Lilly for the Morphomer Tau program is “great news,” highlighting continued interest in targeting intracellular Tau for early Alzheimer’s prevention. […]
